testsuite.name: com.compare.KtorSmokeTest

testcase.name: Ktor server responds to health check()

testsuite.system-out: 16:39:37.626 [DefaultDispatcher-worker-2 @call-context#3] INFO io.ktor.test - No ktor.deployment.watch patterns specified, automatic reload is not active. 16:39:37.640 [DefaultDispatcher-worker-2 @call-context#3] INFO io.ktor.test - Application started in 0.018 seconds. 16:39:37.641 [DefaultDispatcher-worker-3 @coroutine#5] INFO io.ktor.test - Responding at http://localhost:80 16:39:37.641 [DefaultDispatcher-worker-3 @coroutine#5] INFO io.ktor.test - Responding at https://localhost:443 16:39:37.674 [DefaultDispatcher-worker-4 @call-context#15] INFO io.ktor.test - No ktor.deployment.watch patterns specified, automatic reload is not active. 16:39:37.674 [DefaultDispatcher-worker-4 @call-context#15] INFO io.ktor.test - Application started in 0.0 seconds. 16:39:37.674 [DefaultDispatcher-worker-3 @coroutine#17] INFO io.ktor.test - Responding at http://localhost:80 16:39:37.674 [DefaultDispatcher-worker-3 @coroutine#17] INFO io.ktor.test - Responding at https://localhost:443 16:39:37.682 [DefaultDispatcher-worker-5 @call-context#27] INFO io.ktor.test - No ktor.deployment.watch patterns specified, automatic reload is not active. 16:39:37.682 [DefaultDispatcher-worker-5 @call-context#27] INFO io.ktor.test - Application started in 0.0 seconds. 16:39:37.682 [DefaultDispatcher-worker-3 @coroutine#29] INFO io.ktor.test - Responding at http://localhost:80 16:39:37.682 [DefaultDispatcher-worker-3 @coroutine#29] INFO io.ktor.test - Responding at https://localhost:443
